ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic dataset */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the state */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the district */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area or locality */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the area */,
  "total_males" INTEGER /* Total number of males in the area */,
  "total_females" INTEGER /* Total number of females in the area */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Total urban population */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Total rural population */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic dataset */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Description of the age group (e.g., 0-6, 7, 8) */,
  "total_persons" INTEGER /* Total number of persons in this age group */,
  "total_males" INTEGER /* Total number of males in this age group */,
  "total_females" INTEGER /* Total number of females in this age group */,
  "urban_males" INTEGER /* Total urban males in this age group */,
  "urban_females" INTEGER /* Total urban females in this age group */,
  "rural_males" INTEGER /* Total rural males in this age group */,
  "rural_females" INTEGER /* Total rural females in this age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_groups_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographics ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literacy_rates" (
  "literacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for literacy entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic dataset */,
  "illiterate_persons" INTEGER /* Total illiterate persons */,
  "literate_persons" INTEGER /* Total literate persons */,
  "literate_without_level" INTEGER /* Total literate persons without formal educational level */,
  "below_primary" INTEGER /* Total persons below primary level */,
  "primary" INTEGER /* Total persons at primary level */,
  "middle" INTEGER /* Total persons at middle level */,
  "matric_secondary" INTEGER /* Total persons at matric/secondary level */,
  "higher_secondary" INTEGER /* Total persons at higher secondary level */,
  "non_technical_diploma" INTEGER /* Total persons with non-technical diploma or certificate */,
  "technical_diploma" INTEGER /* Total persons with technical diploma or certificate */,
  "graduate_and_above" INTEGER /* Total graduates and above */,
  "unclassified" INTEGER /* Total unclassified educational levels */,
  "male_literacy_rate" REAL /* Male literacy rate */,
  "female_literacy_rate" REAL /* Female literacy rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("literacy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literacy_rates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographics ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for education level entry */,
  "literacy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literacy dataset */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational level (e.g., Below Primary, Primary) */,
  "total_persons" INTEGER /* Total persons in this education category */,
  "total_males" INTEGER /* Total males in this education category */,
  "total_females" INTEGER /* Total females in this education category */,
  "mean_years_of_schooling" REAL /* Mean years of schooling for this education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_levels_literacy_id FOREIGN KEY ("literacy_id") REFERENCES literacy_rates ("literacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs (e.g., North, South) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the state to which the district belongs */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the educational statistics entry */,
  "literacy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literacy dataset */,
  "total_literate" INTEGER /* Total number of literate individuals */,
  "total_illiterate" INTEGER /* Total number of illiterate individuals */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_statistics_literacy_id FOREIGN KEY ("literacy_id") REFERENCES literacy_rates ("literacy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for population growth entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population record */,
  "population_change" INTEGER /* Change in population from previous year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographics ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographics ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the dataset version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographics ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic dataset */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographics ("data_id")
)
